mapper.select:
select pt.part_template_id as part_template_id, a.aircraft_id as aircraft_id, s.subsystem_id as subsystem_id, e.equipment_id as equipment_id, c.component_id as component_id, pt.part_number as part_code, pt.part_name as part_name, pt.material as material, pt.specification as spec_model, pt.design_version as design_version, count(distinct pi.part_instance_id) as instance_count, max(pa.anomaly_level) as risk_level, max(pd.process_name) as current_process, concat(a.aircraft_name, ' / ', s.subsystem_name, ' / ', e.equipment_name, ' / ', c.component_name, ' / ', pt.part_name) as path_text from t3_part_templates pt left join t3_components c on c.component_id = pt.component_id left join t3_equipments e on e.equipment_id = c.equipment_id left join t3_subsystems s on s.subsystem_id = e.subsystem_id left join t3_aircraft a on a.aircraft_id = s.aircraft_id left join t3_part_instances pi on pi.part_template_id = pt.part_template_id left join t3_work_orders wo on wo.part_instance_id = pi.part_instance_id left join t3_process_executions pe on pe.work_order_id = wo.work_order_id left join t3_process_definitions pd on pd.process_def_id = pe.process_def_id left join t3_process_anomalies pa on pa.process_exec_id = pe.process_exec_id
where 1 = 1
and ( pt.part_number like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or pt.part_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and pa.anomaly_level = #{risk_level}
group by pt.part_template_id, a.aircraft_id, s.subsystem_id, e.equipment_id, c.component_id, pt.part_number, pt.part_name, pt.material, pt.specification, pt.design_version, a.aircraft_name, s.subsystem_name, e.equipment_name, c.component_name
order by pt.part_name desc, pt.part_number desc, pt.part_template_id desc
order by pt.part_name asc, pt.part_number asc, pt.part_template_id asc
order by pt.part_number desc, pt.part_name desc, pt.part_template_id desc
order by pt.part_number asc, pt.part_name asc, pt.part_template_id asc
limit #{page_size} offset #{offset}

select count(1) from ( select pt.part_template_id from t3_part_templates pt left join t3_part_instances pi on pi.part_template_id = pt.part_template_id left join t3_work_orders wo on wo.part_instance_id = pi.part_instance_id left join t3_process_executions pe on pe.work_order_id = wo.work_order_id left join t3_process_anomalies pa on pa.process_exec_id = pe.process_exec_id where 1 = 1
and ( pt.part_number like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or pt.part_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and pa.anomaly_level = #{risk_level}
group by pt.part_template_id ) t

select pi.part_instance_id as part_id, pi.part_instance_id as part_instance_id, pt.part_template_id as part_template_id, a.aircraft_id as aircraft_id, s.subsystem_id as subsystem_id, e.equipment_id as equipment_id, c.component_id as component_id, pt.part_number as part_code, pt.part_name as part_name, pt.material as material, pt.specification as spec_model, pi.serial_number as serial_number, pi.batch_number as batch_number, pi.manufacturer as manufacturer, pi.production_date as production_date, pi.image_url as image_url, pi.current_status as status, pi.quality_level as quality_level, pi.key_degree as key_degree, max(pa.anomaly_level) as risk_level, max(pd.process_name) as current_process, concat(a.aircraft_name, ' / ', s.subsystem_name, ' / ', e.equipment_name, ' / ', c.component_name, ' / ', pt.part_name, ' / ', pi.part_instance_id) as path_text from t3_part_instances pi inner join t3_part_templates pt on pt.part_template_id = pi.part_template_id left join t3_components c on c.component_id = pt.component_id left join t3_equipments e on e.equipment_id = c.equipment_id left join t3_subsystems s on s.subsystem_id = e.subsystem_id left join t3_aircraft a on a.aircraft_id = s.aircraft_id left join t3_work_orders wo on wo.part_instance_id = pi.part_instance_id left join t3_process_executions pe on pe.work_order_id = wo.work_order_id left join t3_process_definitions pd on pd.process_def_id = pe.process_def_id left join t3_process_anomalies pa on pa.process_exec_id = pe.process_exec_id where pi.part_template_id = #{part_template_id} group by pi.part_instance_id, pt.part_template_id, a.aircraft_id, s.subsystem_id, e.equipment_id, c.component_id, pt.part_number, pt.part_name, pt.material, pt.specification, pi.serial_number, pi.batch_number, pi.manufacturer, pi.production_date, pi.image_url, pi.current_status, pi.quality_level, pi.key_degree, a.aircraft_name, s.subsystem_name, e.equipment_name, c.component_name order by pi.part_instance_id asc limit #{page_size} offset #{offset}

select * from ( select pe.process_exec_id as process_exec_id, pe.work_order_id as work_order_id, pe.process_def_id as process_def_id, pd.process_def_id as process_id, pd.process_number as process_order, pd.process_name as process_name, pd.equipment_type as equipment_type, pd.standard_duration as standard_duration, pd.is_key_process as is_key_process, pd.is_high_risk as is_high_risk, pe.status as status, pe.start_time as start_time, pe.end_time as end_time, pe.operator as operator, md.device_id as device_id, md.device_name as device_name, pa.anomaly_level as risk_level, pa.anomaly_description as process_desc, pa.detection_time as detection_time, pa.handling_status as handling_status
from t3_part_instances pi inner join t3_work_orders wo on wo.part_instance_id = pi.part_instance_id inner join t3_process_executions pe on pe.work_order_id = wo.work_order_id inner join t3_process_definitions pd on pd.process_def_id = pe.process_def_id left join t3_manufacturing_devices md on md.device_id = pe.device_id left join t3_process_anomalies pa on pa.process_exec_id = pe.process_exec_id
where pi.part_instance_id = #{part_id}
union all
select null as process_exec_id, null as work_order_id, pd.process_def_id as process_def_id, pd.process_def_id as process_id, pd.process_number as process_order, pd.process_name as process_name, pd.equipment_type as equipment_type, pd.standard_duration as standard_duration, pd.is_key_process as is_key_process, pd.is_high_risk as is_high_risk, '未执行' as status, null as start_time, null as end_time, null as operator, null as device_id, null as device_name, null as risk_level, null as process_desc, null as detection_time, null as handling_status
from t3_part_instances pi inner join t3_process_routes pr on pr.part_template_id = pi.part_template_id and pr.is_active = 1 inner join t3_process_definitions pd on pd.route_id = pr.route_id
where pi.part_instance_id = #{part_id} and not exists ( select 1 from t3_work_orders wo2 inner join t3_process_executions pe2 on pe2.work_order_id = wo2.work_order_id where wo2.part_instance_id = pi.part_instance_id ) ) t order by t.process_order asc
mapper.insert: insert into t3_process_executions ( process_exec_id, work_order_id, process_def_id, device_id, start_time, end_time, operator, status ) values ( #{process_exec_id}, #{work_order_id}, #{process_def_id}, #{device_id}, #{start_time}, #{end_time}, #{operator}, #{status} )
mapper.update: update t3_process_executions set work_order_id = #{work_order_id}, process_def_id = #{process_def_id}, device_id = #{device_id}, start_time = #{start_time}, end_time = #{end_time}, operator = #{operator}, status = #{status} where process_exec_id = #{process_exec_id}
update t3_part_instances set image_url = #{image_url}, update_time = now() where part_instance_id = #{part_id}
mapper.select:
select distinct pi.part_instance_id as part_id, pt.part_number as part_code, pt.part_name as part_name, pt.material as material, pt.specification as spec_model, pd.process_def_id as process_id, pd.process_number as process_order, pd.process_name as process_name, pe.status as process_status, pe.start_time as start_time, pe.end_time as end_time
from t3_process_executions pe inner join t3_work_orders wo on wo.work_order_id = pe.work_order_id inner join t3_part_instances pi on pi.part_instance_id = wo.part_instance_id inner join t3_part_templates pt on pt.part_template_id = pi.part_template_id inner join t3_process_definitions pd on pd.process_def_id = pe.process_def_id where pe.device_id = #{device_id} order by pe.start_time desc, pd.process_number asc
